name: Trigger Timer
Steuerlogik Drosselung HM-600
Adjusting data structure
info:
This change node translates the 
collected Home Assistant entities from
a linear array to a direct accessible
lookup table (map).

Access the data by:
`msg.payload["sensor.power"]`
where "senor.power" is the unique `entity_id`

name: Gentle Controller Day Handling Error & Filter
Decision: Day Night Charge or Discharge
Charging Branch
info:
# Actuator Branches

Branch A (Day/Charging): 

Logic specifically tuned for the SolarFlow (e.g., setting the output_limit).

name: Discharging Branch
info:
# Actuator Branches

Branch B (Night/Discharging):

Logic specifically tuned for the Battery (e.g., setting the AC limit to cover base load).
